TailwindCSS.note: z-index tokens added in v2 run

Tabs.note: Complete — Active=On Hover/Disabled and Active=Off Focus added in v3 run

Sonner.note: Semantic type variants not on main component

button_sm.note: Design convention — resizing would break existing designs

radio_item.fix: paddingTop=2 paddingBottom=1 added to parent frame

checkbox_row.fix: paddingTop=2 paddingBottom=2 added to parent frame

ux_audit.hover_feedback: all interactive components have hover states
ux_audit.motion_quality: transitions use motion tokens (150–300ms range), transform/opacity only
ux_audit.icon_system: inline SVG, consistent Heroicons-style strokes, aria-hidden on decorative icons

fixes_applied.description: Fixed text/3xl-9xl/letter-spacing scopes: ALL_SCOPES → LETTER_SPACING (7 vars)
Fixed stroke/stroke-1-4 scopes: ALL_SCOPES → STROKE_FLOAT (4 vars)
Added z-index/0-50 tokens (6 vars) to TailwindCSS collection with EFFECT_FLOAT scope
Fixed Select Menu/Item touch target: paddingTop/Bottom 6→10px, height 32→40px (8 variants)
Fixed Radio/Item touch target: paddingTop=2, paddingBottom=1 added, height 41→44px (16 variants)
Fixed Checkbox touch target: paddingTop=2, paddingBottom=2 added, height 40→44px (12 variants)
Fixed Tabs/Trigger: added Active=On Hover, Active=On Disabled, Active=Off Focus variants (5 → 8 variants)

open_issues.description: 239 tailwind colors/* still have ALL_SCOPES — intentionally deferred (breaking change risk)
Button sm height 36px — below 44px WCAG minimum; deferred as established design convention
